description: After a concrete slab is poured, the site manager must track its curing time and test results before allowing heavy equipment on it.

nodes.task_description: Log the date and time of the concrete pour.

expected_outcome.value: The pour is logged in the system.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the 7-day and 28-day concrete cylinder break test results from the testing agency.

expected_outcome.value: The strength test results are retrieved.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the 28-day strength meets the specified psi required by the structural engineer before clearing the slab for heavy loads.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the concrete has reached its required strength.
